methodology: All data sourced exclusively from official government MoD statements, verified news agencies, and established conflict monitoring organisations. No estimates or projections are used. Missing data is left blank rather than interpolated.

primarySources.name: UAE Ministry of Defence
primarySources.coverage: Daily intercept reports, cumulative totals, casualty figures

primarySources.name: Breaking Defense
primarySources.coverage: Confirmed UAE cumulative totals (1,514 drones, 283 missiles), THAAD/Patriot/KM-SAM confirmation, 6 fatalities

primarySources.name: Long War Journal
primarySources.coverage: Mar 11-12 attack details, all GCC country totals

uae.note: UAE MoD suspended publishing detected/intercepted breakdown after Mar 12/13 for OPSEC. Only 'engaged' totals published since then. Mar 13+ daily entries left blank per no-estimates policy.

primarySources.name: Long War Journal
primarySources.coverage: Official Kuwait cumulative: 414 drones + 226 missiles as of Mar 12

primarySources.name: Long War Journal
primarySources.coverage: Official Qatar cumulative: 69 drones + 162 missiles as of Mar 12

primarySources.name: Long War Journal
primarySources.coverage: Official Bahrain cumulative: 190 drones + 114 missiles as of Mar 12

primarySources.name: Long War Journal
primarySources.coverage: Mar 11-12: Salalah port oil storage struck, Duqm port intercept, Khasab intercept

primarySources.name: Long War Journal
primarySources.coverage: Mar 11-12 drone waves: Shaybah oil field, Eastern Province, Riyadh Diplomatic Quarter

primarySources.name: Lucas Tomlinson / Fox News
primarySources.coverage: IDF confirmed 550 total strikes Feb 28 - Mar 11

israel.note: IDF does not publish daily intercept breakdowns. Only total strike count confirmed publicly. Daily detail unavailable.

globalSources.name: Long War Journal
globalSources.description: US-based conflict monitoring publication. Primary cross-reference source for GCC cumulative data.

globalSources.name: ISW (Institute for the Study of War)
globalSources.description: Used for geopolitical context and conflict analysis.

globalSources.name: Breaking Defense
globalSources.description: Defense industry publication. Key source for UAE-specific analysis.

globalSources.name: OpenSky Network
globalSources.description: Real-time ADS-B flight tracking. Used for airport flight count data.

dataPolicy.noEstimates: We never estimate or project data. If official sources have not published a figure, it is left blank.
dataPolicy.verificationThreshold: Data is only added when confirmed by at least one official government source or two independent verified news sources.
dataPolicy.updateFrequency: Data updated daily via automated MoD account monitoring + manual review
dataPolicy.openSource: Full source code and raw data available at https://github.com/takahser/uae-dashboard
